sqlMap.select: SELECT 1 FROM DUAL WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT $COLUMN$$COLUMN_ORACLE$ FROM $TABLE$ WHERE ROWNUM = 1 )
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ ADD $COLUMN$$COLUMN_ORACLE$ $TYPE_ORACLE$ $AFTER$$AFTER_ORACLE$
ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ DROP PRIMARY KEY
DROP INDEX $CONSTRAINT$
ALTER TABLE $TABLE$ ADD $CONSTRAINT$ PRIMARY KEY $PRIMARY$
sqlMap.update: UPDATE $TABLE$ SET $COLUMN$$COLUMN_ORACLE$ = $UPDATE$$UPDATE_ORACLE$

sqlMap.select: SELECT theme_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH" ( "THEME_ID" NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0, "COMPANY_ID" VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, "USER_ID" VARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "ACCESS_YN" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, "USER_TYPE" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT "TBL_PORTAL_THEME_AUTH_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("THEME_ID","COMPANY_ID", "TENANT_ID", "USER_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT portlet_id FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH where ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH" ( "PORTLET_ID" NUMBER(10,0), "COMPANY_ID" VARCHAR2(100), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), "USER_ID" VARCHAR2(100), "ACCESS_YN" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, "USER_TYPE" NUMBER(5,0), CONSTRAINT "TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_AUTH_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("PORTLET_ID","COMPANY_ID", "TENANT_ID", "USER_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT menucode FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_MENU ADD menucode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT portletcode FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET ADD portletcode VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_MENU SET menucode = CASE WHEN menu_url like '%ezNewPortal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'portal' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'mail' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSchedule%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN menu_url like '%ezApprovalG%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'approval' WHEN menu_url like '%ezBoard%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'board' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCommunity%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN menu_url like '%ezResource%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCircular%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'circular' WHEN menu_url like '%ezJournal%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'journal' WHEN menu_url like '%ezAttitude%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'attitude' WHEN menu_url like '%ezWebFolder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezCabinet%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'cabinet' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPMS%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'pms' WHEN menu_url like '%mailMain.do?funCode=2%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'address' WHEN menu_url like '%ezQuestion%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'question' WHEN menu_url like '%ezPoll%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN menu_url like '%ezLadder%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'ladder' WHEN menu_url like '%ezTask%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'task' WHEN menu_url like '%ezMemo%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'memo' WHEN menu_url like '%ezSurvey%' AND menu_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' END

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET SET portletcode = CASE WHEN portlet_url like '%receivedMailPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'receivedmail' WHEN portlet_url like '%noticePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'notice' WHEN portlet_url like '%votePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'vote' WHEN portlet_url like '%pollPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'poll' WHEN portlet_url like '%schedulePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'schedule' WHEN portlet_url like '%approvalListPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'approvallist' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteFormsPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteforms' WHEN portlet_url like '%photoBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'photoboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%favoriteBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'favoriteboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%communityPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'community' WHEN portlet_url like '%helpPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'help' WHEN portlet_url like '%weatherPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'weather' WHEN portlet_url like '%birthdayPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'birthday' WHEN portlet_url like '%slideImagePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'slideimage' WHEN portlet_url like '%userInfoPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'userinfo' WHEN portlet_url like '%movieBoardPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'movieboard' WHEN portlet_url like '%countPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'count' WHEN portlet_url like '%resourcePortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'resource' WHEN portlet_url like '%surveyPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'survey' WHEN portlet_url like '%webFolderPortlet%' AND portlet_type = 'G' THEN 'webfolder' END
sqlMap.select: SELECT START_IP startIP, END_IP endIP, START_IP_NUMBER startIPNumber, END_IP_NUMBER endIPNumber, COUNTRY_CODE countryCode, COUNTRY_NAME countryName FROM JMOCHA_MAIL_COUNTRYIP WHERE START_IP_NUMBER <= #changeIp# AND END_IP_NUMBER >= #changeIp#
SELECT TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(20,0) NOT NULL, "COUNTRY_CODE" NVARCHAR2(800) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_ACCESS_COUNTRY" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT OWNER_ID FROM TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_SHARE_DOC_DIR ( "OWNER_ID" NVARCHAR2(45) NOT NULL ENABLE, "SHARE_ID" NVARCHAR2(45) NOT NULL ENABLE, "SHARE_TYPE" NVARCHAR2(45), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5, 0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "OWNER_TYPE" NVARCHAR2(45), CONSTRAINT "PK_SHARE_DOC_DIR" PRIMARY KEY ("OWNER_ID", "SHARE_ID", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT USER_ID FROM TBL_PS_POPUP_USER WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_PS_POPUP_USER ( "ITEMSEQ" NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_TYPE" NVARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "COMPANYID" NVARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, "SUBDEPT_PERMITTED" NUMBER(11), "SN" NUMBER(11) DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT "PK_PS_POPUP_USER" PRIMARY KEY ("ITEMSEQ", "USER_ID", "USER_TYPE", "TENANT_ID", "COMPANYID") )
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(member_id) FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (member_type = 'USER' AND member_id = #userId#) OR (member_type = 'DEPT' AND (member_id = #deptId# or member_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (member_type = 'JIKWI' AND member_id IN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#))
)

SELECT COUNT(CN) FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE REGEXP_LIKE (dept_cd_path, (SELECT LISTAGG(dept_cd_path, '|') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY dept_cd_path) FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn IN ( SELECT member_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE group_id = #groupId# AND member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' ) ) ) AND ( cn = #deptId# OR cn IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#) )
SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_APRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_ENDAPRLINEINFO WHERE APRTYPE = '007' AND APRSTATE = '002') AS CNT FROM DUAL
sqlMap.statement: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vaprdoingdoclist AS SELECT tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_aprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007') THEN '017' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCSTATE END AS DOCSTATE, CASE WHEN (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '000' AND tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE <> '004') THEN '002' ELSE tbl_aprdocinfo.FUNCTIONTYPE END AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_aprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_aprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_aprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_aprdocinfo JOIN tbl_aprlineinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_aprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_aprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_aprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expaprdocinfo ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_aprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_aprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE (tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' OR tbl_aprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '005') AND NOT (TBL_APRDOCINFO.functiontype = '004' AND TBL_APRLINEINFO.aprtype = '007') AND tbl_aprdocinfo.STARTDATE IS NOT NULL

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vendchamjodocinfo AS SELECT tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID AS DOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.FORMID AS FORMID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ORGDOCID AS ORGDOCID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTYPE AS DOCTYPE, '017' AS DOCSTATE, '002' AS FUNCTIONTYPE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HREF AS HREF, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCTITLE AS DOCTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCNO AS DOCNO, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASATTACHYN AS HASATTACHYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.HASOPINIONYN AS HASOPINIONYN, tbl_endaprdocinfo.STARTDATE AS STARTDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ENDDATE AS ENDDATE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERID AS WRITERID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME AS WRITERNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE AS WRITERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTID AS WRITERDEPTID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME AS WRITERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprdocinfo.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERNAME2 AS WRITERNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERJOBTITLE2 AS WRITERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.WRITERDEPTNAME2 AS WRITERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERSN AS APRMEMBERSN, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE AS APRTYPE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE AS APRSTATE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERID AS APRMEMBERID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME AS APRMEMBERNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERNAME2 AS APRMEMBERNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2 AS APRMEMBERJOBTITLE2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTID AS APRMEMBERDEPTID, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME, tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2 AS APRMEMBERDEPTNAME2, tbl_endaprlineinfo.RECEIVEDDATE AS RECEIVEDDATE, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME AS FORMNAME, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.FORMNAME2 AS FORMNAME2, tbl_expendaprdocinfo.URGENTAPPROVAL AS URGENTAPPROVAL, tbl_deptmaster.EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE3 AS companyName, tbl_deptmaster.COMPNM2 AS companyName2 FROM (((tbl_endaprdocinfo JOIN tbl_endaprlineinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_endaprlineinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_expendaprdocinfo ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.DOCID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.DOCID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_expendaprdocinfo.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_deptmaster ON (tbl_endaprdocinfo.COMPANYID = tbl_deptmaster.CN AND tbl_endaprdocinfo.TENANT_ID = tbl_deptmaster.TENANT_ID)) WHERE tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRTYPE = '007' AND tbl_endaprlineinfo.APRSTATE = '002' AND TBL_ENDAPRDOCINFO.docstate <> '031'
sqlMap.select: SELECT S_FURIGANA FROM jmocha_address_info WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.update: ALTER TABLE JMOCHA_ADDRESS_INFO ADD S_FURIGANA NVARCHAR2(120) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select:
SELECT COUNT(DEPTID) FROM (SELECT DEPTID, JOBID FROM TBL_ADDJOBMASTER A INNER JOIN TBL_DEPTMASTER TD ON (A.DEPTID = TD.CN AND A.TENANT_ID = TD.TENANT_ID) WHERE A.CN = #userID# AND A.TENANT_ID = #tenantID# UNION SELECT DEPARTMENT AS DEPTID, TO_CHAR(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE7) AS JOBID FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE CN = #userID# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#) D WHERE D.DEPTID = #deptID#
AND D.JOBID = #jobID#
AND (D.JOBID IS NULL OR D.JOBID = '')

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_RS_FAVORITE ( "RESID" NVARCHAR2(40), "RESCOMPANY" NVARCHAR2(40), "USERID" NVARCHAR2(40), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_RS_FAVORITE" PRIMARY KEY ("RESID", "USERID", "TENANT_ID") )

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_USER_DISTRIBUTION ( "DOMAIN_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "OWNER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "DISCLOSURE_POLICY" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "EXPLAINATION" NVARCHAR2(100) DEFAULT NULL, "DL_END_DATE" DATE DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK_JMOCHA_USER_DISTRIBUTION" PRIMARY KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME") )

CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_USER_DISTRIBUTION_MEM ( "DOMAIN_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "MEMBER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "REG_DATE" DATE DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK_JMOCHA_USER_DISTRIBUTION_MEM" PRIMARY KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME", "MEMBER_ID") )

CREATE TABLE JMOCHA_USER_DIST_APPLY ( "DOMAIN_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "APPLICANT_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL ENABLE, "APPLICANT_DATE" DATE DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK_JMOCHA_USER_DIST_APPLY" PRIMARY KEY ("DOMAIN_NAME", "USER_NAME", "APPLICANT_ID") )

sqlMap.select: SELECT TENANT_ID FROM TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER NOT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, "ENG_CHAR_TYPE" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', "USE_ENG_CAPITAL_LETTER" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', "USE_ENG_SMALL_LETTER" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', "USE_NUMBER" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', "USE_SPECIAL_CHAR" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', CONSTRAINT "PK2_TBL_PASSWORD_POLICY" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID","COMPANY_ID") )

sqlMap.select: SELECT TENANT_ID FROM TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP WHERE rownum <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP ( "IPNO" NUMBER(*,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0), "IPADDRESS" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, "ALLOW_ACCESS" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'NO', "EXPLANATION" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK2_TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP" PRIMARY KEY ("IPNO") )

sqlMap.statement: CREATE SEQUENCE "TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_IP_SEQ2" MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER NOCYCLE
sqlMap.select: SELECT companyid FROM TBL_CODELIST WHERE companyid = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND code1 = #code1# AND code2 = #code2# AND rownum = 1
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_CODELIST (CODE1, CODE2, NAME, ISUSE, DESCRIPT, NAME2, NAME3, NAME4, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) VALUES (#code1#, #code2#, #name#, #isUse#, #descript#, #name2#, #name3#, #name4#, #tenantId#, #companyId#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'useAnnualScheduleYN' AND TENANT_ID = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantId#, #propertyName#, #propertyValue#, #description#, #configName#, TO_DATE(#regDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #configType#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE ("ORDER", TYPE_ID, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID, TYPE_NAME, TYPE_NAME2, ISUSE, IMG_PATH, PARENT_ID, FORM_ID, ISADD, ISDEL) VALUES ((SELECT NVL(MAX("ORDER"), 0) + 1 FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#), #typeId#, #companyId#, #tenantId#, #typeName#, #typeName2#, #isUse#, #imgPath#, #parentId#, #formId#, #isAdd#, #isDel#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'useHolidayCheckYN' AND TENANT_ID = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantId#, #propertyName#, #propertyValue#, #description#, #configName#, TO_DATE(#regDate#, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), #configType#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT COMPANY_ID FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_TYPE WHERE COMPANY_ID = #companyId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId# AND TYPE_ID = #typeId#

sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'autoSendOfferFlag' AND TENANT_ID = 0
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID,PROPERTY_NAME,PROPERTY_VALUE,DESCRIPTION,CONFIG_NAME,REGDATE,CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (0, 'autoSendOfferFlag', '0', '자동발송의뢰 사용 시 기안부서 최종결재가 끝나면 기안자의 미처리문서함에 도착한다. 0: 자동발송의뢰 사용안함, 1: 자동발송의뢰 사용함 (내부시행문, 민원인시행문만 자동발송의뢰) (default: 0)', '내부시행문 자동발송의뢰 옵션', TO_DATE('2020-11-23 00:00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재G')
sqlMap.select: SELECT BOARDID FROM TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD ( TABID NUMBER(2,0) NOT NULL, BOARDID NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, COMPANYID NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, BOARDNAME NVARCHAR2(255), BOARDNAME2 NVARCHAR2(255), CONSTRAINT "TBL_BOARD_TABBOARD_PK" PRIMARY KEY (TABID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) )

INSERT INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_URL, PORTLET_TYPE, DEFAULT_ORDER, PORTLETCODE) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, #portletUrl#, #portletType#, #defaultOrder#, #portletCode#)
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_NAME FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'ApprAttachLimit' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PROPERTY_NAME FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'BigSizeApprAttachLimit' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PROPERTY_NAME FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'ApprBigSizeAttachDownloadLimitCount' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PROPERTY_NAME FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'ApprBigSizeAttachLimitCount' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
SELECT PROPERTY_NAME FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'BigSizeApprAttachDelDay' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'ApprAttachLimit', '전자결재 일반 첨부파일 최대 크기', '10', 'MB 단위로 일반 첨부파일의 최대 크기를 지정한다. (default: 10)', TO_DATE(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'BigSizeApprAttachLimit', '전자결재 대용량 첨부파일 최대 크기', '800', 'MB 단위로 대용량 첨부파일의 최대 크기를 지정한다.0: 대용량 첨부파일 사용안함 (default: 800)', TO_DATE(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'ApprBigSizeAttachDownloadLimitCount', '전자결재 대용량첨부 다운로드 횟수 제한', '0', '대용량첨부 다운로드 횟수 제한, 0일 경우 무제한', TO_DATE(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'ApprBigSizeAttachLimitCount', '전자결재 대용량첨부 개수 제한', '0', '대용량첨부 개수 제한, 0일 경우 무제한', TO_DATE(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'BigSizeApprAttachDelDay', '전자결재 대용량 첨부파일 보존기간', '14', '일 단위로 보존기간을 지정한다. 지정한 기간이 지나면 대용량 첨부파일을 삭제한다. (default: 14)', TO_DATE(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

ALTER TABLE TBL_TMPATTACHINFO ADD (ISBIGATTACH CHAR(1 CHAR) DEFAULT 'N', ISBIGATTACHDEL CHAR(1 CHAR) DEFAULT 'N', SAVEDATE DATE)

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantID#, 'useApprFormCont', '양식별문서함 사용유무(전자결재 일반)', 'YES', '전자결재 양식별문서함 사용유무', TO_DATE(sysdate,'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

sqlMap.insert: INSERT ALL INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 1, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '전자문서 차트') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 2, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Chart') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 3, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '図表') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 4, #tenantId#, #companyId#, '図表') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 5, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Chart') INTO TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_NAME (PORTLET_ID, MENU_ID, PORTLET_LANG, TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, PORTLET_NAME) VALUES (#portletId#, #menuId#, 6, #tenantId#, #companyId#, 'Chart') SELECT * FROM DUAL

sqlMap.statement: CREATE SEQUENCE "SEQ_JMOCHA_MAIL_SIGN_TEMP" MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER NOCYCLE

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE jmocha_mailbox_progress ( USER_KEY NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, USER_ID NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, ACT NVARCHAR2(15) NOT NULL, PERCENT NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, UPDATEDT DATE DEFAULT SYSDATE, PRIMARY KEY (USER_KEY, TENANT_ID) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT SEQ_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILEUSER ( "SEQ_ID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "FILE_ID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_ID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USER_TYPE" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CREATE_ID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CREATE_DATE" DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, "COMPANY_ID" VARCHAR2(50 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(7,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "SUBDEPT_PERMITTED" NUMBER(11,0) DEFAULT '0', PRIMARY KEY ("SEQ_ID", "TENANT_ID") )
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FOLDERID MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FILEID MINVALUE 10000000 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FOLDERUSER MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
CREATE SEQUENCE SEQ_FILEUSER MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1000 NOORDER NOCYCLE NOKEEP GLOBAL
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISTINCT group_id FROM tbl_permissiongroupinfo WHERE company_id = #companyId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND ( (member_type = 'USER' AND member_id = #userId#) OR (member_type = 'DEPT' AND (member_id = #deptId# OR member_id IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#))) OR (member_type = 'JIKWI' AND member_id IN ( SELECT TO_CHAR(extensionattribute7) FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId# UNION SELECT jobid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# ) ) OR (member_type = 'JIKCHEK' AND member_id = (SELECT extensionattribute8 FROM tbl_usermaster WHERE cn = #userId# AND tenant_id = #tenantId# AND PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #companyId#)) OR ( member_type = 'DEPT' AND sub_dept_yn = 'Y' AND REGEXP_LIKE ( (SELECT ',' || LISTAGG(dept_cd_path, ',') WITHIN GROUP(ORDER BY dept_cd_path) || ',' FROM tbl_deptmaster WHERE cn = #deptId# OR CN IN (SELECT deptid FROM tbl_addjobmaster WHERE cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#)), ',' || member_id || ',' ) ) )
SELECT FILE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE ( FILE_ID VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL, VERSION NUMBER(7, 0) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(7, 0) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT WEBFOLDER_ENCRYPTED_FILE_PK PRIMARY KEY ("FILE_ID", "VERSION", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT VERSION FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY" ( "FILE_ID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL, "VERSION" NUMBER(7, 0) DEFAULT 1 NOT NULL, "FILE_PATH" VARCHAR2(250 BYTE) NOT NULL, "FILE_SIZE" NUMBER NOT NULL, "USE_STATUS" VARCHAR2(250 BYTE) DEFAULT 'Y' NOT NULL, "UPDATE_DATE" DATE NOT NULL, "UPDATE_ID" VARCHAR2(80 BYTE) NOT NULL, "UPDATE_NAME" VARCHAR2(120 BYTE) NOT NULL, "UPDATE_NAME2" VARCHAR2(120 BYTE), "DELETER_ID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(7, 0) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "TBL_WEBFOLDER_FILE_HISTORY" PRIMARY KEY ("FILE_ID", "VERSION", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT FILE_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_LOG ADD ( FILE_ID VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL, VERSION NUMBER(7,0) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_ID VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_PATH VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL, FOLDER_PATH_NAME VARCHAR2(500 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL, TOP_FOLDER_ID VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL, TOP_FOLDER_NAME VARCHAR2(200 BYTE) DEFAULT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT FOLDER_ID FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT ( FOLDER_ID VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(7, 0) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT WEBFOLDER_NO_INHERIT_PK PRIMARY KEY ("FOLDER_ID", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT FOLDER_NAME FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HISTORY WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_WEBFOLDER_APPLY_HISTORY ( APPLY_ID NVARCHAR2(40), TENANT_ID NUMBER(5,0), COMPANY_ID NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, FOLDER_NAME NVARCHAR2(200) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONTENT NVARCHAR2(1000), APPLICATION_DATE DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, APPROVAL_STATUS NVARCHAR2(10), APPROVAL_STATUS_UPDATEDT DATE, CONSTRAINT "PK2_TBL_WF_APPLY_HISTORY" PRIMARY KEY ("APPLY_ID") )

sqlMap.select: SELECT CAR_ID FROM TBL_CAR_ACL WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_CAR_ACL" ( "CAR_ID" NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL ENABLE, "MEMBER_NAM" NVARCHAR2(20), "MEMBER_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, "ACCESS_LVL" NVARCHAR2(2), "DEPT_YN" NVARCHAR2(2), "SDA_YN" NVARCHAR2(2), "COMPANYID" NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_CAR_ACL" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "CAR_ID", "MEMBER_ID", "COMPANYID") )

sqlMap.select: SELECT OLDFLAG_TOP FROM VTASKCLASS WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT OLDFLAG_TOP FROM SVTASKCLASS WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW vtaskclass AS SELECT tbl_taskcategory.CATEGORYCODE AS CATEGORYCODE, tbl_taskcategory.NAME AS CNAME, tbl_taskcategory.NAME2 AS CNAME2, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.MCATEGORYCODE AS MCATEGORYCODE, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.NAME AS MCNAME, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.NAME2 AS MCNAME2, tbl_tasksubcategory.SUBCATEGORYCODE AS SUBCATEGORYCODE, tbl_tasksubcategory.NAME AS SCNAME, tbl_tasksubcategory.NAME2 AS SCNAME2, tbl_taskcode.TASKCODE AS TASKCODE, tbl_taskcode.TASKNAME AS TASKNAME, tbl_taskcode.TASKNAME2 AS TASKNAME2, tbl_taskcode.KEEPINGPERIOD AS KEEPINGPERIOD, tbl_taskcode.DISPLAYRECFLAG AS DISPLAYRECFLAG, tbl_taskcode.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG AS SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, tbl_taskcode.SC1 AS SC1, tbl_taskcode.SC2 AS SC2, tbl_taskcode.SC3 AS SC3, tbl_taskcode.TEMPFLAG AS TEMPFLAG, tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_task_deptinfo.PROCESSDEPTCODE AS PROCESSDEPTCODE, tbl_task_deptinfo.PROCESSDEPTNAME AS PROCESSDEPTNAME, tbl_task_deptinfo.PROCESSDEPTNAME2 AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, tbl_taskcode.KEEPINGMETHOD AS KEEPINGMETHOD, tbl_taskcode.KEEPINGPLACE AS KEEPINGPLACE, tbl_taskcode.DISPLAYRECTRASTIME AS DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG AS DELFLAG, tbl_taskcategory.OLDFLAG AS OLDFLAG_TOP, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.OLDFLAG AS OLDFLAG_MID, tbl_tasksubcategory.OLDFLAG AS OLDFLAG_SUB FROM ((((tbl_taskcategory JOIN tbl_taskmiddlecategory ON (tbl_taskcategory.CATEGORYCODE = tbl_taskmiddlecategory.CATEGORYCODE AND tbl_taskcategory.TENANT_ID = tbl_taskmiddlecategory.TENANT_ID AND tbl_taskcategory.COMPANYID = tbl_taskmiddlecategory.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_tasksubcategory ON (tbl_taskmiddlecategory.MCATEGORYCODE = tbl_tasksubcategory.MCATEGORYCODE AND tbl_taskmiddlecategory.TENANT_ID = tbl_tasksubcategory.TENANT_ID AND tbl_taskmiddlecategory.COMPANYID = tbl_tasksubcategory.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_taskcode ON (tbl_tasksubcategory.SUBCATEGORYCODE = tbl_taskcode.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND tbl_tasksubcategory.TENANT_ID = tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID AND tbl_tasksubcategory.COMPANYID = tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID AND tbl_taskcode.DELFLAG = '0')) LEFT JOIN tbl_task_deptinfo ON (tbl_taskcode.TASKCODE = tbl_task_deptinfo.TASKCODE AND tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID = tbl_task_deptinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID = tbl_task_deptinfo.COMPANYID)) WHERE tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG = '0' OR tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG IS NULL OR tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG = '2'

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW svtaskclass AS SELECT tbl_taskcategory.CATEGORYCODE AS CATEGORYCODE, tbl_taskcategory.NAME AS CNAME, tbl_taskcategory.NAME2 AS CNAME2, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.MCATEGORYCODE AS MCATEGORYCODE, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.NAME AS MCNAME, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.NAME2 AS MCNAME2, tbl_tasksubcategory.SUBCATEGORYCODE AS SUBCATEGORYCODE, tbl_tasksubcategory.NAME AS SCNAME, tbl_tasksubcategory.NAME2 AS SCNAME2, tbl_taskcode.TASKCODE AS TASKCODE, tbl_taskcode.TASKNAME AS TASKNAME, tbl_taskcode.TASKNAME2 AS TASKNAME2, tbl_taskcode.KEEPINGPERIOD AS KEEPINGPERIOD, tbl_taskcode.DISPLAYRECFLAG AS DISPLAYRECFLAG, tbl_taskcode.SPECIALCATALOGFLAG AS SPECIALCATALOGFLAG, tbl_taskcode.TEMPFLAG AS TEMPFLAG, tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID AS COMPANYID, tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID AS TENANT_ID, tbl_task_deptinfo.PROCESSDEPTCODE AS PROCESSDEPTCODE, tbl_task_deptinfo.PROCESSDEPTNAME AS PROCESSDEPTNAME, tbl_task_deptinfo.PROCESSDEPTNAME2 AS PROCESSDEPTNAME2, tbl_taskcode.KEEPINGMETHOD AS KEEPINGMETHOD, tbl_taskcode.KEEPINGPLACE AS KEEPINGPLACE, tbl_taskcode.DISPLAYRECTRASTIME AS DISPLAYRECTRASTIME, tbl_taskcode.ISPUBLIC AS ISPUBLIC, tbl_taskcode.ITEMSECURITY AS ITEMSECURITY, tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG AS DELFLAG, tbl_taskcategory.OLDFLAG AS OLDFLAG_TOP, tbl_taskmiddlecategory.OLDFLAG AS OLDFLAG_MID, tbl_tasksubcategory.OLDFLAG AS OLDFLAG_SUB FROM ((((tbl_taskcategory JOIN tbl_taskmiddlecategory ON (tbl_taskcategory.CATEGORYCODE = tbl_taskmiddlecategory.CATEGORYCODE AND tbl_taskcategory.TENANT_ID = tbl_taskmiddlecategory.TENANT_ID AND tbl_taskcategory.COMPANYID = tbl_taskmiddlecategory.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_tasksubcategory ON (tbl_taskmiddlecategory.MCATEGORYCODE = tbl_tasksubcategory.MCATEGORYCODE AND tbl_taskmiddlecategory.TENANT_ID = tbl_tasksubcategory.TENANT_ID AND tbl_taskmiddlecategory.COMPANYID = tbl_tasksubcategory.COMPANYID)) JOIN tbl_taskcode ON (tbl_tasksubcategory.SUBCATEGORYCODE = tbl_taskcode.SUBCATEGORYCODE AND tbl_tasksubcategory.TENANT_ID = tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID AND tbl_tasksubcategory.COMPANYID = tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID)) LEFT JOIN tbl_task_deptinfo ON (tbl_taskcode.TASKCODE = tbl_task_deptinfo.TASKCODE AND tbl_taskcode.TENANT_ID = tbl_task_deptinfo.TENANT_ID AND tbl_taskcode.COMPANYID = tbl_task_deptinfo.COMPANYID)) WHERE tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG = '0' OR tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG IS NULL OR tbl_task_deptinfo.DELFLAG = '2'
sqlMap.select:
SELECT property_name, property_value FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE tenant_id = #tenantID# AND property_name IN

SELECT SCHEDULEID FROM TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE ( SCHEDULEID NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, REPEATCOUNT NUMBER(10) NOT NULL, ISALLREP NCHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N', STARTDATE DATE NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5), COMPANYID VARCHAR2(40), CONSTRAINT TBL_SCHEDULE_COMPLETE_PK PRIMARY KEY (SCHEDULEID, REPEATCOUNT, ISALLREP, STARTDATE) )

{call DECLARE tbl_exists EXCEPTION; pragma exception_init (tbl_exists , -00955); BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE TABLE TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO ( SEQUENCE NUMBER(19,0) NOT NULL, USERID NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, USERNM NVARCHAR2(100), USERNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), DEPTID CHAR(50 CHAR), DEPTNM NVARCHAR2(100), DEPTNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), TITLE NVARCHAR2(100), TITLE2 NVARCHAR2(100), COMPANYID CHAR(50 CHAR), COMPANYNM NVARCHAR2(100), COMPANYNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), ACCESSIP VARCHAR2(50 CHAR), ACCESSINFO VARCHAR2(50 CHAR), ACCESSTIME DATE, ACCESSBROWSER CHAR(10 CHAR), ACCESSOS CHAR(20 CHAR), ACCESSAGENT NVARCHAR2(500), ADMINTYPE NVARCHAR2(200), TENANT_ID NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO PRIMARY KEY (SEQUENCE) )'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE SEQUENCE "SEQ_TBL_ADMIN_ACCESS_INFO" MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER NOCYCLE'; EXCEPTION WHEN tbl_exists THEN NULL; END }

{call DECLARE tbl_exists EXCEPTION; pragma exception_init (tbl_exists , -00955); BEGIN EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE TABLE TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO ( SEQUENCE NUMBER(19,0) NOT NULL, USERID NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, USERNM NVARCHAR2(100), USERNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), DEPTID NVARCHAR2(50), DEPTNM NVARCHAR2(100), DEPTNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), TITLE NVARCHAR2(100), TITLE2 NVARCHAR2(100), COMPANYID NVARCHAR2(50), COMPANYNM NVARCHAR2(100), COMPANYNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), AUTHORIZEDTIME DATE, ADMINTYPE NVARCHAR2(200), STATUS NVARCHAR2(40), AUTHORIZERID NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, AUTHORIZERNM NVARCHAR2(100), AUTHORIZERNM2 NVARCHAR2(100), AUTHORIZERIP VARCHAR2(50 CHAR), TENANT_ID NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO PRIMARY KEY (SEQUENCE) )'; EXECUTE IMMEDIATE 'CREATE SEQUENCE "SEQ_TBL_PERMISSION_CHANGE_INFO" MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER NOCYCLE'; EXCEPTION WHEN tbl_exists THEN NULL; END }

sqlMap.select: SELECT FORM_HTML2 FROM TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM ADD FORM_HTML2 VARCHAR(3000) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.update:
UPDATE TBL_ATTITUDE_FORM SET FORM_HTML2 = CASE WHEN FORM_ID = 0 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 1 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 2 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 3 THEN 'Date ' WHEN FORM_ID = 4 THEN 'NameDate Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 5 THEN 'NameDate Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 6 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 7 THEN 'NameDate ~ Workplace Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 8 THEN 'NameDate
All day ~ Workplace Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 9 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information Substitute ' WHEN FORM_ID = 10 THEN 'NameDate ~ Contact information ' ELSE NULL END WHERE FORM_HTML2 IS NULL

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, ';f=',';q=') WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 like '%;f=%'
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, ';ff=',';q=') WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 like '%;ff=%'
UPDATE TBL_USERMASTER SET EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 = REPLACE(EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1, ';wf=',';f=') WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 like '%;wf=%'

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP SET NTSTARTDATE = #NtStartDate#, NTENDDATE = #NtEndDate# WHERE EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 = 1

INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantID#, 'apprSignRemapApplyTime', '전자결재 서명 데이터 재맵핑 시점', TO_CHAR(SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '결재서명 데이터를 재맵핑하기 위해, TBL_SIGNINFO 테이블에 정상적인 데이터 삽입을 보장하는 시점을 정의한다. 해당 시점 이후에 기안된 문서들이 결재서명 재맵핑 대상이 된다. (UTC 시간, YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS 형식)', sysdate, '전자결재')

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES ('0', 'loadTimeForApprAll', '200', '다안기안 문서 표출 시 글꼴,스크롤 오류를 해결하기 위한 setTimeout 시간. 네트워크 환경에 따라 적절한 시간 조절을 위해 사용(default:200)', '다안기안 문서 로딩시간', TO_DATE('2024-01-11 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재G')
sqlMap.select: SELECT SEQ FROM TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO" ("SEQ" NUMBER(19,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "DEPTID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, "DEPTNM" NVARCHAR2(100), "DEPTNM2" NVARCHAR2(100), "PARENT_DEPTID" NVARCHAR2(80), "PARENT_DEPTNM" NVARCHAR2(100), "PARENT_DEPTNM2" NVARCHAR2(100), "COMPANYID" NVARCHAR2(80), "COMPANYNM" NVARCHAR2(100), "COMPANYNM2" NVARCHAR2(100), "UPDATEDT" DATE, "TARGET_DEPTID" NVARCHAR2(80), "TARGET_DEPTNM" NVARCHAR2(100), "TARGET_DEPTNM2" NVARCHAR2(100), "UPDATE_TYPE" NVARCHAR2(50), "EXECUTORID" NVARCHAR2(50), "EXECUTORNM" NVARCHAR2(100), "EXECUTORNM2" NVARCHAR2(100), "EXECUTORIP" VARCHAR2(50 CHAR), "TENANTID" NUMBER DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_DEPT_CHANGE_INFO" PRIMARY KEY ("SEQ"))
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'SurveyPostingMaxPeriod' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'SurveyPostingMaxPeriod', '999', '전자설문 설문 종료 후 게시기간 최대일자를 설정한다. (default:999)', '전자설문 종료 후 게시기간 설정', TO_DATE('2024-03-26 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '전자설문')
sqlMap.select: SELECT DOCID FROM TBL_TOTAL_HISTORY WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_TOTAL_HISTORY" ( "DOCID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "USERID" NVARCHAR2(400) NOT NULL, "REGDATE" DATE NOT NULL, "GUBUN" varchar(12) DEFAULT NULL, "USERJOBTITLE" NVARCHAR2(40) DEFAULT NULL, "USERDEPTID" NVARCHAR2(400) DEFAULT NULL, "USERDEPTNAME" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, "USERNAME" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, "USERNAME2" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, "USERJOBTITLE2" NVARCHAR2(200) DEFAULT NULL, "USERDEPTNAME2" NVARCHAR2(400) DEFAULT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "COMPANYID" NVARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_TOTAL_HISTORY" PRIMARY KEY ("DOCID", "USERID", "REGDATE", "TENANT_ID", "COMPANYID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'delAttachByOthers' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'delAttachByOthers', '0', '결재에서 첨부를 올린사람 이외의 사람도 삭제가능여부를 결정하는 테넌트 값(0 : 불가 1 : 허용), (default:0) ', '결재에서 첨부파일을 다른사람이 지울수있는 여부', TO_DATE('2021-03-05 00:00:00', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '전자결재')
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'useHideHeaderArea' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'useHideHeaderArea', 'NO', '전자결재 mht양식 headerArea 필드 숨기기 기능 사용여부. 양식에 headerArea 필드가 있어야 사용 가능. YES: 사용 NO: 사용안함 (default: NO)', '헤더 숨기기 기능 사용여부', TO_DATE('2024-05-23 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재')

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_RS_BRD ADD REPEATFLAG NCHAR(1) DEFAULT TO_NCHAR('1')

sqlMap.select: SELECT USER_TYPE, SUBDEPT_PERMITTED FROM tbl_ps_quicklink_acl WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE tbl_ps_quicklink_acl ADD ( USER_TYPE NVARCHAR2(50), SUBDEPT_PERMITTED CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'N' )
sqlMap.update: UPDATE tbl_ps_quicklink_acl qla SET qla.user_type = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_usermaster um WHERE qla.accessid = um.cn AND qla.TENANT_ID = um.TENANT_ID) THEN 'USER' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_deptmaster dm WHERE qla.accessid = dm.cn AND qla.TENANT_ID = dm.TENANT_ID) THEN 'DEPT' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_jobmaster ujm WHERE qla.accessid = TO_CHAR(ujm.jobid) AND qla.TENANT_ID = ujm.TENANT_ID AND ujm."TYPE" = '001') THEN 'jIKWI' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_user_jobmaster ujm WHERE qla.accessid = TO_CHAR(ujm.jobid) AND qla.TENANT_ID = ujm.TENANT_ID AND ujm."TYPE" = '002') THEN 'JIKCHEK' WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_permissiongrouplist pgl WHERE qla.accessid = pgl.group_id AND qla.TENANT_ID = pgl.TENANT_ID) THEN 'GROUP' ELSE 'USER' END, qla.subdept_permitted = CASE WHEN EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM tbl_deptmaster dm WHERE qla.accessid = dm.cn AND qla.TENANT_ID = dm.TENANT_ID) THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'endDateOptionConfig' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'endDateOptionConfig', 'NOPE', '게시판 게시물 리스트 조회 시 만료게시물 조회가능 여부 / NOPE:불가, ADMIN:관리자만 조회가능, ALWAYS:전부 조회 가능 (default:NOPE)', '만료게시물 조회가능 여부', TO_DATE('2024-05-24 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '게시판')
sqlMap.select: SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'ApprNonElecRecType' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID#
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'ApprNonElecRecType', '전자결재G 비전자문서등록 양식 확장자', 'HWP', '전자결재 G버전의 비전자문서 등록 시, 양식 확장자를 설정한다. (MHT 또는 HWP) (default : HWP)', TO_DATE('2021-04-07 00:00:00','yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '전자결재G')
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "JMOCHA_APPR_ALLOWED_DOMAIN" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "DOMAIN_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "JMOCHA_APPR_ALLOWED_DOMAIN_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("COMPANY_ID", "TENANT_ID", "DOMAIN_NAME") )

CREATE TABLE "JMOCHA_APPR_USER" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, "USER_TYPE" NVARCHAR2(10) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "JMOCHA_APPR_USER_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "COMPANY_ID", "USER_ID", "USER_TYPE") )

CREATE TABLE "JMOCHA_APPR_HISTORY" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "MAIL_UID" NUMBER NOT NULL, "SUBJECT" CLOB, "SENDEREMAIL" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_DEPTID" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_DEPTNAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_DEPTNAME2" NVARCHAR2(100), "WRITE_DATE" DATE, "APPROVER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100), "APPROVER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "APPROVER_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100), "UPDATEDT" DATE, "STATE" NVARCHAR2(10), "MEMO" NVARCHAR2(200), "DEL_FLAG" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', CONSTRAINT "JMOCHA_APPR_HISTORY_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "MAIL_UID", "USER_ID") )

CREATE TABLE "JMOCHA_APPR_COMP_HISTORY" ( "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL, "COMPANY_ID" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, "MAIL_UID" NUMBER NOT NULL, "SUBJECT" CLOB, "SENDEREMAIL" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, "USER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_DEPTID" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_DEPTNAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "USER_DEPTNAME2" NVARCHAR2(100), "WRITE_DATE" DATE, "APPROVER_ID" NVARCHAR2(100), "APPROVER_NAME" NVARCHAR2(100), "APPROVER_NAME2" NVARCHAR2(100), "UPDATEDT" DATE, "STATE" NVARCHAR2(10), "MEMO" NVARCHAR2(200), "DEL_FLAG" NVARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT 'N', CONSTRAINT "JMOCHA_APPR_COMP_HISTORY_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("TENANT_ID", "MAIL_UID", "USER_ID") )

CREATE TABLE jmocha_address_last_sent ( SEQUENCE NUMBER GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0, CN NVARCHAR2(80), NAME NVARCHAR2(100), EMAIL NVARCHAR2(100), SENT_DATE DATE DEFAULT SYS_EXTRACT_UTC(SYSTIMESTAMP) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT #v_COLUMN# FROM jmocha_appr_allowed_domain jmocha_appr_user jmocha_appr_history jmocha_appr_comp_history jmocha_address_last_sent WHERE ROWNUM = 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT COLUMN_NAME AS columnNm, DATA_DEFAULT AS columnDefault, CASE WHEN NULLABLE = 'Y' THEN 'NULL' ELSE 'NOT NULL' END isNullAble, CASE WHEN DATA_TYPE = 'NVARCHAR2' THEN DATA_TYPE || '(' || DATA_LENGTH/2 || ')' WHEN DATA_TYPE = 'DATE' THEN DATA_TYPE WHEN DATA_TYPE = 'NUMBER' THEN DATA_TYPE || '(' || DATA_PRECISION || ')' WHEN DATA_TYPE = 'VARCHAR2' THEN DATA_TYPE || '(' || CHAR_LENGTH || ')' ELSE DATA_TYPE || '(' || DATA_LENGTH || ')' END columnType FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_USERMASTER' AND COLUMN_NAME NOT IN (SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM USER_TAB_COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_USERMASTER_RETIRE')

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE ( SIZE_ID NUMBER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT PK_TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE PRIMARY KEY, CLASS_SIZE VARCHAR2(100) )

CREATE TABLE TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE ( TENANT_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, COMPANY_ID NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, PORTLET_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, THEME_ID NUMBER NOT NULL, SIZE_ID NUMBER NOT NULL CONSTRAINT FK_TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE REFERENCES TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_SIZE, DEFAULT_FLAG NUMBER, CONSTRAINT PK_TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET_COMPANY_SIZE PRIMARY KEY (TENANT_ID, COMPANY_ID, THEME_ID, PORTLET_ID, SIZE_ID) )

sqlMap.statement:
CREATE TABLE "TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER" ( "SCHEDULEID" NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "PARENTID" NUMBER(10,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, "OWNERID" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, "OWNERNAME" NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, "OWNERNAME2" NVARCHAR2(50), "CREATORID" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CREATORNAME" NVARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL ENABLE, "CREATORNAME2" NVARCHAR2(50), "SCHEDULETYPE" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "DATETYPE" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "STARTDATE" DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, "ENDDATE" DATE NOT NULL ENABLE, "REPETITION" NVARCHAR2(50), "TITLE" NVARCHAR2(250) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "COMPANYID" VARCHAR2(40), "REMINDERSTATUS" NCHAR(1) DEFAULT '0', "OFFSETINFO" CHAR(10), "LANG" NVARCHAR2(10), "OFFSETMIN" NVARCHAR2(10),
CONSTRAINT "TBL_SCHEDULE_REMINDER_SCHEDULER_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("SCHEDULEID") )

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE MENU_TYPE = 'MG'

sqlMap.select: SELECT USECOLOR FROM TBL_PORTAL_TOP_USER WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_PORTAL_TOP_USER ADD USECOLOR NUMBER(1) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TBL_PORTAL_THEME WHERE THEME_NAME LIKE '테마%'
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_NAME = '기본형', THEME_NAME2 = 'Default Type', THEME_NAME3 = 'きほんがた' WHERE THEME_ID = 1
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_NAME = '바로가기형', THEME_NAME2 = 'Shortcut Type', THEME_NAME3 = 'ショートカットがた' WHERE THEME_ID = 2
UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME SET THEME_NAME = '정보분리형', THEME_NAME2 = 'Information Separation Type', THEME_NAME3 = 'じょうほうぶんりがた' WHERE THEME_ID = 3
sqlMap.select: SELECT DEPTID FROM TBL_RS_SCHEDULE WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_RS_SCHEDULE ADD DEPTID NVARCHAR2(80) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT REPLYLEVEL FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY ADD ( REPLYLEVEL NUMBER(10,0), PARENTREPLYID NVARCHAR2(100), PARENTWRITERNAME NVARCHAR2(50), UPDATEDATE DATE )
sqlMap.select: SELECT IMAGECONTENT FROM TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_ONELINEREPLY ADD IMAGECONTENT NVARCHAR2(600) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT DISLIKEFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO ADD DISLIKEFLAG NCHAR(1) DEFAULT NULL
sqlMap.select: SELECT ITEMID FROM TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE" ( "ITEMID" NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USERID" NVARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, "DISLIKEDATE" NVARCHAR2(20), "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_BOARD_DISLIKE_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("ITEMID", "USERID", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT KEYWORDID FROM TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
SELECT KEYWORDID FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE "TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD" ( "KEYWORDID" NUMBER(5) NOT NULL, "KEYWORDNAME" NVARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL UNIQUE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD" PRIMARY KEY ("KEYWORDID", "TENANT_ID") )

CREATE TABLE "TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD" ( "KEYWORDID" NUMBER(5) NOT NULL, "BOARDID" NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL, "ITEMID" NVARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5) NOT NULL, "SN" NUMBER(3) NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT "PK_TBL_BOARD_BOARDITEM_KEYWORD" PRIMARY KEY ("KEYWORDID", "ITEMID", "SN", "TENANT_ID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT COUNT(SEQUENCE_NAME) FROM USER_SEQUENCES WHERE SEQUENCE_NAME = 'TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD_SEQ'
sqlMap.statement: CREATE SEQUENCE "TBL_BOARD_KEYWORD_SEQ" MINVALUE 1 MAXVALUE 9999999999999999999999999999 INCREMENT BY 1 START WITH 1 CACHE 20 NOORDER NOCYCLE
sqlMap.select: SELECT CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_FAV_CAT WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_RS_FAV_CAT ( CAT_ID VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, TOP_ID VARCHAR2(80), USER_ID VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, CAT_NAME VARCHAR2(200) NOT NULL, UPDATEDATE TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, COMPANYID VARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL, BRDYN VARCHAR2(10), TENANT_ID NUMBER(5) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_tbl_rs_fav_cat PRIMARY KEY (CAT_ID, TENANT_ID) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT CAT_ID FROM TBL_RS_CAT_BRD WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_RS_CAT_BRD ( CAT_ID VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, BRD_ID VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, USER_ID VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, COMPANYID VARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL, UPDATEDATE TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT pk_tbl_rs_cat_brd PRIMARY KEY (CAT_ID, BRD_ID, USER_ID, TENANT_ID) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT ATTACHMENTFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO ADD ATTACHMENTFLAG CHAR(1) DEFAULT 'Y'
sqlMap.select: SELECT PUBLICFLAG FROM TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO WHERE ROWNUM = 1
sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_BOARDINFO ADD "PUBLICFLAG" CHAR default 'N'
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_ITEM ADD "PUBLICFLAG" CHAR default 'Y'
ALTER TABLE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_TEMP ADD "PUBLICFLAG" CHAR default 'Y'
sqlMap.select: SELECT LISTTYPE FROM TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION WHERE LISTTYPE = 'E' AND TENANT_ID = #v_TENANTID# AND ROWNUM = 1

sqlMap.select: SELECT USERSCRAPCONTID FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONT WHERE rownum = 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_USERSCRAPCONT ( "USERSCRAPCONTID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "USERSCRAPCONTNAME" VARCHAR2(255 BYTE), "PARENTSCRAPCONTID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE), "DESCRIPTION" VARCHAR2(255 BYTE), "USERID" VARCHAR2(100 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, "TENANT_ID" NUMBER(5,0) NOT NULL ENABLE, "COMPANYID" VARCHAR2(20 BYTE) NOT NULL ENABLE, CONSTRAINT "TBL_USERSCRAPCONT_PK" PRIMARY KEY ("USERSCRAPCONTID", "TENANT_ID", "COMPANYID") )
sqlMap.select: SELECT USERSCRAPCONTID FROM TBL_USERSCRAPCONTLIST WHERE rownum = 1

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET SET MENU_ID = ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE MENUCODE = 'mResource' ) WHERE PORTLET_ID IN ( SELECT PORTLET_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLETCODE = 'mResource' )

UPDATE TBL_PORTAL_THEME_PORTLET SET MENU_ID = ( SELECT MENU_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_MENU WHERE MENUCODE = 'mSchedule' ) WHERE PORTLET_ID IN ( SELECT PORTLET_ID FROM TBL_PORTAL_PORTLET WHERE PORTLETCODE = 'mSchedule' )

sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#v_TENANTID#, 'useExecSchedulePublic', 'ON', '일정관리 > 임원일정의 조회 가능 범위 설정 여부 ON : 모든 사용자 조회 / OFF : 임원비서만 조회', '일정관리 > 임원일정 조회 가능 범위 설정', TO_DATE('2025-07-07 00:00:00', 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mi:ss'), '일정관리')

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_C_CLUBUSER ADD GRADE VARCHAR2(10) DEFAULT '4' NOT NULL

sqlMap.statement: ALTER TABLE TBL_C_CLUB ADD ( JOIN_GRADE number(10) DEFAULT 4 NOT NULL, MEMLIST_READGRADE varchar2(10) DEFAULT '4' NOT NULL )
sqlMap.select: SELECT GRADENAME FROM TBL_C_GRADE WHERE ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_C_GRADE ( C_CLUBNO VARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL, GRADECODE VARCHAR2(50) NOT NULL, GRADENAME VARCHAR2(100) NOT NULL, COMPANYID VARCHAR2(40) NOT NULL, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL, CONSTRAINT PK_TBL_C_GRADE PRIMARY KEY (C_CLUBNO, GRADECODE, COMPANYID, TENANT_ID) )
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) from tbl_comm_boardmanage where accessid != 'everyone' and tenant_id = 0 and ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.delete: delete from tbl_comm_boardmanage where accessid != 'everyone' and tenant_id = 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) from tbl_comm_boardmanage where (boardadmin_fg = 'true' or boardadmin_fg = 'false') and tenant_id = 0 and ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.update: update tbl_comm_boardmanage set boardadmin_fg = '1', listview_fg = '10', read_fg = '4', write_fg = '3', reply_fg = '3', delete_fg = '2', inherit_fg = '1' where (boardadmin_fg = 'true' or boardadmin_fg = 'false') and tenant_id = 0
sqlMap.select: SELECT count(*) from tbl_c_clubuser where grade = '4' and (permit = '4' or permit = '0') and TENANT_ID = 0 and ROWNUM <= 1
sqlMap.update: update tbl_c_clubuser set grade = CASE WHEN permit = '4' THEN '1' WHEN permit = '0' THEN '10' ELSE grade END where grade = '4' and permit IN ('0', '4') and TENANT_ID = 0
sqlMap.select: select c.c_clubno, c.companyid, c.tenant_id from tbl_c_club c where not exists ( select 1 from tbl_c_grade g where g.c_clubno = c.c_clubno and g.companyid = c.companyid and g.TENANT_ID = c.TENANT_ID )

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_TENANT_CONFIG SET PROPERTY_VALUE = #value# WHERE UPPER(property_name) = #property# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantID#
sqlMap.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG t USING ( SELECT 'susinScheduleCnt' AS PROPERTY_NAME, '1' AS PROPERTY_VALUE FROM DUAL ) s ON (t.PROPERTY_NAME = s.PROPERTY_NAME) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.PROPERTY_VALUE = DECODE(#value#, '0', '0', DECODE(t.PROPERTY_VALUE + 1, 11 , 1, t.PROPERTY_VALUE + 1)) WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES(0, s.PROPERTY_NAME, s.PROPERTY_VALUE, '수신스케쥴러 실행 카운트', '수신스케쥴러 실행 카운트', TO_DATE('2025-08-22','yyyy-mm-dd'), '전자결재G')

sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_CIRCULAR_LISTOPTION SET NAME6 = #name6# WHERE NAME1 = #name# AND NAME2 = #name2#
UPDATE TBL_CODELIST SET NAME6 = #name6# WHERE NAME = #name# AND NAME2 = #name2#
UPDATE TBL_LISTINFO SET NAME6 = #name6# WHERE NAME = #name# AND NAME2 = #name2#
UPDATE TBL_LISTOPTION SET NAME6 = #name6# WHERE NAME = #name# AND NAME2 = #name2#
UPDATE TBL_BOARD_ITEM_LISTOPTION SET NAME6 = #name6# WHERE NAME1 = #name# AND NAME2 = #name2#
UPDATE TBL_LISTOPTION SET NAME6 = #name6# WHERE SN = #sn# AND NAME = #name#

sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_APPROVE_ERROR_INFO ( DOCID NVARCHAR2(80) NOT NULL ENABLE, TENANT_ID NUMBER(5,0) DEFAULT 0 NOT NULL ENABLE, COMPANYID NVARCHAR2(20) NOT NULL ENABLE, ERROR_MESSAGE NVARCHAR2(2000) NULL , ERROR_CASE NVARCHAR2(200) NULL , CREATEDATE DATE NULL , UPDATEDATE DATE NULL , CONSTRAINT TBL_APPROVE_ERROR_INFO_PK PRIMARY KEY (DOCID, TENANT_ID, COMPANYID) )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, CONFIG_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (#tenantID#, 'accountYearTimeZone', '전자결재 회계년도 계산 시 타임존 선택 옵션', 'KST', '회계년도 계산 시, UTC 또는 KST (한국 표준시)를 사용할지 선택한다. (default: KST)', sysdate, '전자결재G')
sqlMap.delete: DELETE FROM TBL_ERRORLOG WHERE LOGDATE < ADDDATE(NOW(), - (SELECT PROPERTY_VALUE FROM TBL_TENANT_CONFIG WHERE PROPERTY_NAME = 'ERRORLOGDAY'))
sqlMap.insert: INSERT INTO TBL_ERRORLOG (MESSAGE, ERRORLOG) VALUES(#message#, #error#)
sqlMap.statement: CREATE TABLE TBL_ERRORLOG ( LOGDATE TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, MESSAGE VARCHAR2(2000), ERRORLOG CLOB )
sqlMap.insert: INSERT ALL INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (0, 'ERRORCLASS', 'EzApproval', '에러로그 발생 클래스 구분자 ;', '에러 발생 클래스명', TO_DATE('2026-04-10 00:00:00','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '전자결재') INTO TBL_TENANT_CONFIG (TENANT_ID, PROPERTY_NAME, PROPERTY_VALUE, DESCRIPTION, CONFIG_NAME, REGDATE, CONFIG_TYPE) VALUES (0, 'ERRORLOGDAY', '365', '에러로그 저장기간 (일)', '에러로그 저장기간 (일)', TO_DATE('2026-04-10 00:00:00','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS'), '전자결재') SELECT 1 FROM DUAL
